positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a serene cosmic creature, resembling a glowing winged manta ray suspended in deep space. The creature should be rendered with clean, flowing lines and glowing bioluminescent accents. The background is an abstract blend of deep indigo, sapphire blue, and vibrant purple nebulae, punctuated by sparse, geometric constellations. Use a vibrant, high-contrast vaporwave aesthetic combined with celestial watercolor washes. Focus on a central, symmetrical composition that emphasizes the silhouette and internal glowing details. The overall mood should be magical, dreamy, and powerful. Suitable for screen printing on apparel.
